iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 58% (up). Day 20 auto - % (up). Day 22 Hour 08 UTC. ~70% (CRITICAL). Dimona/Arad strikes: 160+ injured (84 Arad, 78 Dimona) — BBC confirms. Interceptors failed on 2 ballistic missiles. IAEA: no radiation at Dimona facility. Natanz struck 2nd time (Mar 21) — Iran confirms, no radiation leak. Iran: 400kg HEU remains. Parliament Speaker: 'entering new phase.' Trump 48hr ultimatum to obliterate power plants still active (~16hrs remaining). Updated 2026-03-22T08:04:00Z

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 100% (up). Day 20 auto - % (up). Day 22 Hour 08 UTC. 100% (capped, IMMINENT). Trump 48hr ultimatum ACTIVE - ~16hrs remaining (~00:53 CET Mar 24). BBC: MEU (2,500 troops) deploying from Japan + California. Iran warns: Kharg Island attack → Red Sea insecurity + energy fires regionwide. Joe Kent (NCTC dir) resigned over opposition to Iran war. latest_news.headline: Iranian missiles injure 160 in Arad and Dimona — interceptors failed
latest_news.text: 84 injured in Arad, 78 in Dimona from Iranian ballistic missiles that penetrated Israeli air defenses. 10-year-old boy seriously hurt in Dimona. Interceptors launched but failed to hit threats. State of emergency declared in Arad.

latest_news.headline: Marine Expeditionary Unit deploying to Middle East — 2,500 combat troops
latest_news.text: MEU departed Japan, another from California — both heading to Middle East. Analysts suggest Kharg Island seizure as potential objective. Trump: 'If I were sending ground troops, I wouldn't tell you.'

latest_news.headline: Iran warns: attack Kharg Island and we'll set fire to energy facilities regionwide
latest_news.text: Iran state media warns any attack on Kharg Island (90% of Iran oil exports) would cause 'insecurity in the Red Sea' and 'set fire to energy facilities throughout the region' — major escalation threat.

latest_news.headline: NCTC Director Joe Kent resigns over opposition to Iran war
latest_news.text: US National Counterterrorism Center director Joe Kent resigns, speaking out against Iran war at prayer event. Says he opposed the conflict — internal US dissent signal.

iran_conventional.syria_escalation_note: Monitoring. Israel strikes in Sweida province Syria continue. Potential for separate tracker if escalation widens.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 70% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 22 Hour 08 UTC. ~80%+ (IMMINENT via coupling). Sustained operations. IDF Tehran wide-scale strikes continue. Ground fighting in S. Lebanon (Khiam area). Hezbollah full barrages ongoing. 1,024+ killed, 1M+ displaced. No major new escalation but sustained high-intensity operations. Updated 2026-03-22T08:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Israel strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut - 7 neighborhoods evacuated
latest_news.text: Israeli military strikes Hezbollah targets in Beirut early Saturday. Evacuation warnings for 7 neighborhoods in southern suburbs. Jets bombed Beirut at 3am. Ghandouriyeh house strike kills 1, wounds 2.

latest_news.headline: WaPo: Israel strikes Hezbollah health center, kills 12 medical workers
latest_news.text: Israeli strike hit Hezbollah-run health center in southern Lebanon, killed 12 medical workers. Israel widens campaign beyond fighters to civilian infrastructure.

turkey.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 2% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 22 Hour 08 UTC. ~2% base, ~17% with coupling (DETERRENT). No new incidents. 3 Patriot batteries at Incirlik. Stable. Updated 2026-03-22T08:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

india.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 3% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 22 Hour 08 UTC. ~3% (DETERRENT). No new developments. Stable. Updated 2026-03-22T08:04:00Z

russia.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 14% (up). Day 20 auto - % (up). Day 22 Hour 08 UTC. ~15% base (DETERRENT). Putin calls Iran 'loyal friend' to Mojtaba Khamenei. Russia condemns Natanz strike. No new NATO-Russia incidents. Stable. Updated 2026-03-22T08:04:00Z

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 41% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 22 Hour 08 UTC. ~42% base (CRITICAL). US-brokered talks continue in Florida, more sessions Sunday (DW/Reuters). ISW: Russia increasingly conducting mechanized assaults — spring-summer 2026 offensive prep. Russian attacks kill 4 in Donetsk, Chernihiv without power. Deaths on both sides. Ukraine compulsory child evacuation from Donbas. Peace process active but Russia intransigent. latest_news.headline: US-backed Ukraine-Russia talks continue, more sessions Sunday
latest_news.text: Ukraine and Russia trade strikes as US-brokered talks in Florida continue. Deaths reported on both sides. More negotiating sessions scheduled for Sunday.

latest_news.headline: Russia intensifying mechanized assaults — spring-summer offensive prep
latest_news.text: ISW assessment: Russian forces increasingly conducting mechanized assaults on frontline, possibly part of intensified preparation for Spring-Summer 2026 offensive.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 auto - DETERRENT 26% (stable). Day 20 auto - % (stable). Day 22 Hour 08 UTC. ~29% (ELEVATED). Eid ceasefire holding through Mar 24 (Saudi/Qatar/Turkey request). TTP also truce. No new fighting. Post-Eid resumption feared Mar 25. Updated 2026-03-22T08:04:00Z

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding, TTP also declares 3-day truce
latest_news.text: 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Qatar welcomes truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected.

top_signals: TRUMP 48-HR ULTIMATUM: ~16hrs remaining (~00:53 CET Mar 24) — 'obliterate POWER PLANTS' if Hormuz not opened
Iran: if power plants hit, ALL US energy infra + IT + desalination facilities targeted + Red Sea insecurity
160+ WOUNDED in Dimona/Arad strikes — interceptors FAILED on 2 Iranian ballistic missiles near nuclear site
Natanz nuclear facility STRUCK AGAIN (2nd strike) — IAEA: no radiation
MEU (2,500 troops) deploying from Japan + California — potential Kharg Island seizure
KATZ: Strikes to 'intensify significantly' this week
Hormuz effectively closed — 1,000+ cargo ships blocked
NCTC Director Kent RESIGNS over opposition to Iran war
US lifts sanctions on ~140M barrels Iranian oil — energy price pressure
Russia-Ukraine talks continue in Florida, more sessions Sunday
Russia intensifying mechanized assaults — spring-summer offensive prep (ISW)

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: Day 22 Hour 08 UTC. DE-ESCALATION: Ukraine/US talks continue. Pakistan ceasefire to Mar 24. IAEA: no radiation. ESCALATION: Trump ultimatum ~16hrs. 160+ wounded Dimona/Arad. MEU deploying. Iran threatens Red Sea + energy fires. NET: RECIPROCAL ESCALATION intensifying toward ultimatum deadline.

latest_news.headline: Bahrain intercepts 2 more missiles - total now 143 missiles, 242 drones since war began
latest_news.text: Bahrain defense forces intercept and destroy 2 more Iranian missiles. Total since Feb 28: 143 missiles and 242 drones. Sustained Iranian bombardment continues.

latest_news.headline: Saudi Arabia intercepts 47 Iranian drones - 38 in just 3 hours
latest_news.text: Saudi Ministry of Defense reports intercepting 47 Iranian drones over eastern region. 38 drones concentrated in a 3-hour window - heavy sustained bombardment.

latest_news.headline: DPRK Supreme People's Assembly 15th Session convenes in Pyongyang
latest_news.text: 1st Session of 15th Supreme People's Assembly convenes in Pyongyang (Mar 22). Workers Party won all 687 seats (99.93%). Constitutional revision expected. Kim Yo Jong influence rising with 70% deputy reshuffle.

latest_news.headline: Kuwait Mina al-Ahmadi refinery hit by second wave of Iranian drones
latest_news.text: Two waves of Iranian drones hit Kuwait's Mina al-Ahmadi refinery (one of Middle East's largest, 730k bpd capacity). Fire sparked. Second strike on this facility.

outlook: IMMINENT (Day 22, 08:00 UTC). CRITICAL: Trump 48hr ultimatum ~16hrs to deadline. 160+ wounded in Dimona/Arad — air defense failure confirmed. MEU deploying (Kharg Island seizure speculation). Iran threatens Red Sea + regionwide energy fires. Natanz struck again. Katz: strikes 'intensify significantly.' NET: RECIPROCAL ESCALATION spiraling toward ultimatum expiry. No diplomatic off-ramps visible. Power plant strikes likely within 16hrs if ultimatum expires without Hormuz opening.
de_escalation_watch: Day 22 Hour 08 UTC. DE-ESCALATION: Ukraine/US talks continue in Florida, more sessions Sunday. Pakistan-Afghanistan ceasefire to Mar 24. IAEA: no radiation at Natanz/Dimona. US unsanctions 140M barrels Iranian oil. ESCALATION: Trump 48-HR ULTIMATUM (~16hrs remaining). 160+ wounded in Dimona/Arad — interceptors failed. MEU deploying. Iran threatens Red Sea + energy fires if Kharg Island attacked. Netanyahu: 'continue striking on all fronts.' Katz: intensify significantly. NET: RECIPROCAL ESCALATION intensifying. Ultimatum deadline approaching fast with no Hormuz compliance. Power plant strikes possible within 16 hours.
